features.name: Swarm
features.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny bat. The swarm can't regain Hit Points or gain Temporary Hit Points.

actions.name: Bites
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (2d4) Piercing damage, or 2 (1d4) Piercing damage if the swarm is Bloodied.

tactical_info.combat_role: Area Control Swarm - Large flying harassment unit
tactical_info.positioning: Uses flight to occupy enemy spaces and control battlefield areas
tactical_info.damage_output: 5 piercing damage (2 when bloodied) with swarm positioning advantage
tactical_info.key_abilities: Blindsight for darkness operations, Swarm mechanics for space control
tactical_info.weaknesses: Low HP, reduced damage when bloodied, vulnerability to area effects
tactical_info.synergies: Excellent for battlefield control and supporting other creatures
